title: PlannerOutput
description: Output contract for the Planner agent. Every planner response must conform to this schema.

role_statement.description: Identifies this output as coming from the planner role.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task being planned.

plan_steps.description: Ordered list of actions for the worker to execute.

action.description: Human-readable description of what this step does.

skill.description: Skill ID to invoke for this step (e.g., safe_refactor_v1).

inputs.description: Key-value pairs of inputs required by the skill.

expected_output.description: Description of what successful completion looks like.

evidence.description: Codegraph query results or source references justifying this step.

selected_skill.description: Primary skill ID selected for the task. For multi-step plans with different skills, this is the dominant skill.

estimated_budget_tokens.description: Total estimated token cost for executing the plan.

confidence.description: Planner confidence in the plan. Must be >= 0.7 to proceed without human review.

missing_evidence.description: List of information gaps that could not be resolved. Empty array if none.

in_scope.description: Files, modules, and symbols that may be modified.

out_of_scope.description: Files, modules, and symbols that must NOT be modified.
